name: @firegrid/fluent
description: Restate-like fluent API over the Firegrid TanStack/S2 durable runtime (Fable-native EffSharp port).

scripts.build: NUGET_PACKAGES=${NUGET_PACKAGES:-$PWD/../../.nuget/packages} dotnet tool run fable -- Firegrid.Fluent.fsproj -o dist --optimize --noCache --noRestore
scripts.diagnostics: echo '@firegrid/fluent diagnostics are covered by dotnet build'
scripts.lint: echo '@firegrid/fluent lint is covered by F# compile'
